description_long: This is a plush, rounded stuffed toy resembling a cartoon animal, likely a cat or rabbit, with a predominantly white body and soft pink accents on its ears, paws, and tail. The face features large, oval brown eyes, thick brown eyebrows, and a small, simple nose and mouth, giving it a gentle, neutral expression. Around its neck is a pastel pink scarf or collar, adorned with a large, shiny golden bell at the front. The toy stands upright on two short legs, with small, rounded arms at its sides and a tiny tail at the back. The surface appears smooth and matte, with a soft, squeezable texture typical of stuffed toys. It is displayed on a flat, circular blue base, which serves as a stand but is not part of the toy itself.
description: A soft, white cartoon animal stuffed toy with pink accents, a pink scarf, and a large golden bell around its neck. It has a gentle, neutral face and stands upright on a blue base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's face, pink scarf, and golden bell clearly.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the toy's tail, back, and the side of the bell.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and small tail, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view from the opposite side, showing the tail, back, and a partial view of the bell.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon cat or rabbit with a bell
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with large oval eyes, thick brown eyebrows, and a small, simple mouth. The features give it a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms at its sides and legs slightly apart, head facing forward.
